title: Huge delay in processing monetization request
excerpt:
Hello, 
We submitted some apps for monetization about two weeks ago but got no answer yet. 
Last time we got a response in a couple of days. 
I tried to reach out to Shaul but he never replied. 
Is everything ok? Should …

posts.author: a.arcifa (Andrea Arcifa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
We submitted some apps for monetization about two weeks ago but got no answer yet.
Last time we got a response in a couple of days.
I tried to reach out to Shaul but he never replied.
Is everything ok? Should I re-submit the forms?
Please help

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @a.arcifa,

Which form did you use?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: a.arcifa (Andrea Arcifa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I filled the form through the Developer Center, under Monetization in each app.
See screenshot

image1893×1207 99.6 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @a.arcifa,

Would you be able to please let me know about your app’s name so I can ask the marketplace team about this?

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @a.arcifa,

For some reason I can not see the name. It appears as hidden.

But you can contact our marketplace team here.

Cheers,
Matias
